headline: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Inflation worries dragged the major averages down on Wednesday, with the Dow Industrials falling about 768 points to its closing low for 2026.

headline: Amazon Might Pull Some Business From USPS. That’s Good for FedEx and UPS, but Not in the Way You Think.
summary: If Amazon doesn’t renew its last-mile delivery relationship with the USPS there will be more packages for other logistics providers to deliver.

raw.headline: Amazon Might Pull Some Business From USPS. That’s Good for FedEx and UPS, but Not in the Way You Think.
raw.summary: If Amazon doesn’t renew its last-mile delivery relationship with the USPS there will be more packages for other logistics providers to deliver.

headline: Amazon says U.S. Postal Service 'walked away at the eleventh hour' in negotiations
summary: Amazon said it was working toward a new agreement with the U.S. Postal Service  to increase volumes before talks fell apart.

raw.headline: Amazon says U.S. Postal Service 'walked away at the eleventh hour' in negotiations
raw.summary: Amazon said it was working toward a new agreement with the U.S. Postal Service  to increase volumes before talks fell apart.

headline: USPS must win higher-value, heavier packages, CEO says
summary: The Postal Service wants to increase its average package weight to improve its competitive position with FedEx and UPS, Postmaster General David Steiner said.

raw.headline: USPS must win higher-value, heavier packages, CEO says
raw.summary: The Postal Service wants to increase its average package weight to improve its competitive position with FedEx and UPS, Postmaster General David Steiner said.

headline: Q4 Rundown: United Parcel Service (NYSE:UPS) Vs Other Air Freight and Logistics Stocks
summary: Wrapping up Q4 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the air freight and logistics stocks, including United Parcel Service (NYSE:UPS) and its peers.
